Our Core Belief

"Specification-led project growth is never accidental. It is designed through project intelligence, earned through expertise, protected across every stakeholder, and converted into consistent revenue."

🎯
Designed
Through deliberate project intelligence and pipeline discipline — not chance. Every project is qualified, mapped, and entered at the right stage before pursuit begins.
🏆
Earned
Through specification authority and design influence that stakeholders recognise and trust. Technical credibility, CPD delivery, and design-stage presence that earns the right to be specified.
🔒
Protected
Across every stakeholder in the project ecosystem — architect, PMC, contractor, client, and procurement. Stakeholder alignment and substitution protection built before it is needed.
💰
Converted
Into revenue — through commercial discipline, negotiation strategy, and key account development. Specification influence becomes predictable project growth.

The Growth System

Six Connected Capabilities.
One Permanent System.

Pragmatic Step builds the operating system behind specification-led project growth — from early project intelligence through to commercial conversion and long-term strategic account expansion.

Project Intelligence & Pipeline Discipline
↳ Enter early
  • Most enter at Stage 04 — too late
  • Influence only possible at Stage 01–02
  • System-fed, not person-dependent
01
Specification Authority & Design Influence
↳ Earn the spec
  • Presentations remembered as brochures
  • Consultations remembered as conversations
  • Architects call back when they trust
02
Stakeholder Alignment & Specification Protection
↳ Protect the position
  • Winning at architect level is just the start
  • PMC, contractor, QS can all unravel it
  • Protection built before it is needed
03
Commercial Conversion & Negotiation Strategy
↳ Convert to revenue
  • Approval is influence. Order is revenue.
  • Big pipeline volume, low orders — the common gap
  • Three scenarios. Three distinct playbooks.
04
Business Development & Growth Expansion
↳ Expand the pipeline
  • SME-led BD generates inbound interest
  • Product-led BD generates rejections
  • New relationships pursue the SME
05
Key Account Management & Strategic Growth
↳ Compound the relationships
  • Managed accounts grow. Maintained ones stagnate.
  • One contact change can end an account
  • Each project should accelerate the next
06
Project Lifecycle — Sequential   01 → 04Strength in each enables the next. A gap in one limits every stage that follows.
Growth Engine — Parallel   05 + 06Run continuously — expanding the pool that 01–04 execute against.
The Project Cycle

Where Project is
Won or Lost

Your window to influence a project narrows at every stage. Pragmatic Step builds your presence, your protection, and your conversion discipline across the entire lifecycle.

01
Highest Influence Window
Design Stage
  • Design intent set
  • Categories selected
  • Suppliers shortlisted
Get In Here
02
Game Won or Lost Here
Specification
  • Products named
  • Equivalents listed
  • Technical criteria set
Win the Language
03
Protect Your Position
Tender
  • Quotations requested
  • Pricing begins
  • Substitutions tested
Defend & Hold
04
Revenue Recognised
Procurement
  • Vendor confirmed
  • PO issued
  • Delivery scheduled
Convert & Close
The Stakeholder Ecosystem

Four Stakeholders.
One Decision Chain.

Each holds a different power at a different moment in the project cycle. Win them all.

Stakeholder 01
📐
Architect / Designer
  • Writes the specification at design stage
  • Highest influence — engage early or miss the window
  • Technical trust built over time makes specification the natural outcome
Stakeholder 02
📋
PMC / Consultant
  • Controls specification on large and complex projects
  • Approves or rejects equivalents at any stage
  • Most underserved stakeholder in most specification programmes
Stakeholder 03
⛑️
Contractor / Applicator
  • Executes the purchase — can substitute without protection
  • Most common leakage point between spec written and revenue
  • AVL registration and contractor champions close this gap
Stakeholder 04
🏢
Client / Developer
  • Ultimate authority — can override architect and PMC
  • Rarely engaged by specification teams
  • One conversation at the right moment is worth months of downstream effort
How the System Works

The Project Growth
Playbook

Five connected plays. One compounding system. Pragmatic Step builds this across your live projects, your active pipeline, and your key accounts - from day one.

🎯
Phase 01
Prospect & Qualify
  • Disciplined pipeline sourcing
  • Project viability scoring before entry
  • No wasted pursuit on unwinnable deals
✅
Phase 02
Win the Specification
  • Map every stakeholder in the decision chain
  • Engineer specification language competitors cannot mirror
  • Enter at design stage — before the document opens
🔐
Phase 03
Protect the Specification
  • Secure AVL registration before tender is issued
  • Cover all stakeholder positions against substitution
  • Close every gap between spec written and PO placed
💰
Phase 04
Convert to Revenue
  • Negotiate from a written mandate, not price pressure
  • Protect margin through to procurement close
  • Convert specification wins into recognised revenue
🚀
Phase 05
Build the Growth Engine
  • Flawless delivery turns stakeholders into advocates
  • Reference projects seed the next specification cycle
  • Each win compounds brand authority for the next project

A Structured Path to
Project-Winning Growth

Four steps. Each one building on the last. Starting with a conversation that costs nothing.

01
Step One · DIAGNOSE
Discovery Call
1 Hour  ·  No Pitch  ·  No Cost
A diagnostic conversation. We map your specification reality and identify the gaps costing you margin — before committing to anything.
No pitch. No cost. Just clarity.
02
Step Two · FIX
Project Growth Blueprint
1-Day Workshop
Align your team to project sales dynamics across all six growth capabilities. Shared language, clear pipeline strategy, and a stakeholder map built from day one.
Map the gaps. Own the direction.
03
Step Three · BUILD
Project Growth Bootcamp
4-Week Transformation
Pipeline discipline, stakeholder strategy, specification authority, and commercial conversion systems rebuilt — applied directly to your real projects and accounts in live field conditions.
System built. Not trained.
04
Step Four · SCALE
Project Growth Partner
Ongoing Association
Weekly pipeline reviews and embedded support across all six capabilities — running in parallel with everything your team already does — until project growth becomes your primary commercial engine.
Co-pilot embedded. Every week.
